0.text: Stable atelectasis with traction bronchiectasis in the paramediastinal area of the medial segment of the right middle lobe

1.text: Subsegmental atelectasis in the inferior lingular segment of the left upper lobe

2.text: Subsegmental atelectasis in both lower lobes

3.text: Increase in size of nodular consolidation areas in the posterior segments of both lower lobes

4.text: Increase in size of nodular consolidation areas in the superior segment of the left lower lobe

5.text: Increase in size of nodular consolidation areas in the medial segment of the right middle lobe

6.text: Increase in size of nodular consolidation areas in the medial segments of both lower lobes
